steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: The subject is "map" (singular), and the blank must be followed by a singular verb that matches it. The remaining text after the blank includes "shows" (third-person singular), setting the tense and agreement standard.

steps.title: Apply the subject-verb agreement rule
steps.content: Choice A (describes) uses a third-person singular verb to match the singular subject "map." Choices B–D use plural or non-third-person singular forms ("\describe," have described," "are describing"). That matches choice A — A is correct.
